name: Luby's Spanish Slaw with Dressing
recipeIngredient: Green onions, sliced into 1/8-inch thick pieces (1/4 cup)
Dill pickles, sliced into 1/8-inch thick pieces (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spanish Slaw
1. Discard outer leaves from the cabbage; wash and cut the head in half.
2. Remove the center core.
3. Cut into 1/8-inch strips against the vein.
4. Cut pieces into 2-inch portions.
5. Place the cabbage in a large serving bowl.
6. Add parsley, carrot, bell peppers, onions, and pickles.
7. Pour dressing over top and mix well.
8. Chill until ready to serve.
2. Dressing
1. In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together water, pickle juice, white vinegar, sugar, salad oil, salt, and black pepper.
2. Use the dressing as directed above.
